notes: Pure JS repo, zero .ts/.tsx anywhere (verified: find -iname '*.ts' -o -iname '*.tsx' returns nothing) -- default glob MUST widen from corpus default '**/*.{ts,tsx}' to '**/*.js' or every always-tag rule installs against zero matching files. GLOB TUNING is the point of this fixture: test files carry NO '.test.' or '.spec.' suffix at all (test/validator.js, test/fields.js, test/chain/start.js, etc.) -- the corpus default test glob '**/*.{test,spec}.{ts,tsx}' matches nothing here, not even after extension-widening to .js, because the suffix convention itself is absent. The repo's real convention is purely directory-based: every real test lives under test/ (confirmed via package.json 'ava' field having no custom 'files' glob, so AVA's own default test-file discovery -- files under test/ -- is what actually runs; also cross-checked scripts.ava = 'cross-env NODE_ENV=test ava' with no path args). Tuned test glob is 'test/**/*.js', a directory-scope substitution, not a suffix-widening. No react (no jsx/tsx, no react dep). No db (no ORM/client import, no schema files -- this is a pure rule-compiler/validator library, ohm-js grammar + ramda + rxjs, all in-memory). No distributed evidence (no fetch/http/websocket/queue/payment/messaging code in src/ or helpers/).

rules_notes.rules-as-data-over-scattered-conditional: + src/data/card-rules.js — policy as declarative rule tables walked by one evaluator
rules_notes.lookup-table-over-conditional-chain: + src/validator.js — _validate dispatches on fixed key set via large switch(ast.type)
rules_notes.exhaustiveness-is-a-compile-error-not-a-: - RIGHT shape requires TS; TS-prescription rules never install in pure JS (labeler ruling 2026-07-10)
rules_notes.data-as-spec-earns-its-trigger: + src/validator.js — member-blind interpreter over a tagged AST corpus
rules_notes.one-behavior-per-test: + test/validator.js — real AVA test blocks; one asserts over two distinct fixtures
rules_notes.test-observable-behavior-not-structure: + test/validator.js — AVA tests assert against the public export surface
rules_notes.as-cast-requires-a-named-justification: - pure JS, zero .ts — no cast surface can exist
rules_notes.static-domain-tables-use-as-const-satisf: - no TypeScript; card-rules.js is a plain JS literal
rules_notes.generics-only-for-a-real-relationship-be: - pure-JS repo has no type parameters
rules_notes.branded-primitives-for-domain-ids: - zero TS — branding surface cannot exist
rules_notes.mood-names-commands-facts: - input event data objects but no emitted/named commands or facts
rules_notes.set-prefix-means-caller-supplied-write: - API is all getType/validator/is/compile — no setter surface at all
